message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Actor
participant "WizardAction" as WizardAction
participant "Language" as Language
participant "UIController" as UIController
participant "FromulaCompiler" as FromulaCompiler

note right of Actor
  Extention loading and integration with main UI can be found on Example Extention diagrams
end note

Actor -> WizardAction: starts use case
WizardAction -> frame : WizardFrame: new(UIController)
frame : WizardFrame -> controller : WizardController: new(UIController)
controller : WizardController -> Language: getFunctions()
Language -> controller : getInstance()
controller : WizardController -> Language: getFunctions()

loop
  frame : WizardFrame -> frame : WizardFrame: displayInformation()
end

Actor -> frame : WizardFrame: Select Function
frame : WizardFrame -> controller : WizardController: getExpression(function)

loop
  frame : WizardFrame -> frame : WizardFrame: loadTextFields()
end

frame : WizardFrame -> Actor: show the expression to user
Actor -> frame : WizardFrame: Sets parameters and selects ok
frame : WizardFrame -> controller : WizardController: getResult(String expression)
controller : WizardController -> UIController: cell=getActiveCell()
controller : WizardController -> FromulaCompiler: getInstance()
controller : WizardController -> FromulaCompiler: compile(cell,expression)
FromulaCompiler -> controller : WizardController: return result

@enduml
